title: Hieracium islandiciforme
taxonomy: Hieracium islandiciforme is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Hieracium, commonly known as hawkweeds. The plant is native to certain regions and is known for its unique characteristics. As a part of the Asteraceae family, Hieracium islandiciforme shares similarities with other dandelion-like plants. Its classification is further detailed in botanical studies, which categorize it according to its morphology and phylogenetic relationships.
